mapper.select: select id, stu_name as stuName, gender, age, stu_class as stuClass from student order by id
select id, stu_name as stuName, gender, age, stu_class as stuClass from student where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into student(stu_name, gender, age, stu_class) values(#{stuName}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{stuClass})
mapper.update: update student set stu_name=#{stuName}, gender=#{gender}, age=#{age}, stu_class=#{stuClass} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, stu_name as stuName, gender, age, stu_class as stuClass from student where stu_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by id
